name: Pumpkin-Raisin Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Low-fat milk or orange juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the oil, sugar, eggs, and pumpkin until light and fluffy.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the flours, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and raisins.
3. Stir in the milk or orange juice into the creamed mixture.
4. Pour the batter into an oiled 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes.
